title: Login reaches dashboard
description: Verifies a returning user can log in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Complete profile after signup and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a newly registered user can complete required profile fields and is redirected to the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Fill valid required profile information into all required fields
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Take a practice exam end-to-end to results
description: Verifies a student can start a practice exam, answer questions with navigation, submit, and reach a results view.

steps.description: Click the navigation to open the practice exams list
Choose an available practice exam from the list
Select an answer option for the current question
Select an answer option for that question
Verify a results view with score and XP feedback is displayed

title: Sign up reaches email confirmation step
description: Verifies a prospective visitor can register with name, email, and password and is taken to the email confirmation step.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill test.user+{{RANDOM}}@example.com into the email field
Fill ValidPass123! into the password field
Verify the user lands on the confirm email page

title: Complete profile saves and enters dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated new user can complete missing profile information, save it, and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill valid required profile information in the form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Starting a Gabaritos-cost exam deducts once
description: Verifies starting a practice exam with a Gabaritos cost results in a single deduction and does not double-deduct when reloading the exam page.

steps.description: Click the navigation to open the practice exams list
Choose a practice exam that requires a Gabaritos cost
Record the current displayed Gabaritos balance
Press F5 to reload the page
Verify the displayed Gabaritos balance reflects only a single deduction for the exam start

title: Study schedule cards appear after creating a schedule
description: Verifies a student can create a study schedule with exam details, subjects, and topics and sees it listed as a schedule card.

steps.description: Click the navigation to open study schedule management
Start creating a new study schedule
Fill Concurso E2E {{RANDOM}} into the exam name field
Fill a valid future date into the exam date field
Add at least one subject and at least one topic
Verify study schedule cards are displayed and include the newly created schedule

title: Create a text-only post and see it in the feed
description: Verifies a logged-in user can publish a new text post and it appears in the social feed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the social feed
Fill "Post TC001" into the post text field
Verify the new post appears in the feed

title: View profile with XP and Gabaritos balances
description: Verifies the profile page loads and displays the user's profile information including XP and Gabaritos balance.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Verify XP and Gabaritos balance are displayed

title: Search for users and send a friend request
description: Verifies a user can search for another user and send a friend request that shows as pending.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open friends management
Fill "test" into the user search field
Send a friend request to the first result
Verify the request shows as a pending outgoing request

title: Edit name and bio and persist changes
description: Verifies a user can update their name and bio and the updated information is shown after saving.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Fill Test User Updated into the name field
Fill Bio updated for UI test into the bio field
Verify the updated name and bio are displayed on the profile page

title: Open schedule details shows timeline and subject breakdown
description: Verifies a student can open a schedule card and view its detailed timeline and subject breakdown.

steps.description: Click the navigation to open study schedule management
Start creating a new study schedule
Fill Concurso Detalhes {{RANDOM}} into the exam name field
Fill a valid future date into the exam date field
Add at least one subject and at least one topic
Open the newly created schedule card
Verify the schedule detail view shows a timeline and a subject breakdown

title: Like a post and add a comment
description: Verifies a user can like a post and add a comment that appears under the post.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the social feed
Like the first post in the feed
Add a comment "Comment TC002" to the same post
Verify the new comment appears under the post

title: Track study progress persists after reload
description: Verifies a student can mark progress for a subject in schedule details and the updated progress remains after a page reload.

steps.description: Click the navigation to open study schedule management
Start creating a new study schedule
Fill Concurso Progresso {{RANDOM}} into the exam name field
Fill a valid future date into the exam date field
Add at least one subject and at least one topic
Open the newly created schedule card
Mark progress for one subject using the available progress control
Press F5 to reload the page
Verify the previously marked subject progress is still reflected in the schedule details

title: Accept an incoming friend request and see the new friend
description: Verifies a user can accept an incoming friend request and the requester appears in the friends list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open friends management
Open the incoming friend requests section
Accept the first incoming friend request
Verify the accepted user appears in the friends list

title: Change password from profile settings
description: Verifies a user can submit a password change from profile settings and sees a confirmation state in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid new password into the confirm password field
Verify a password change confirmation is visible

title: Practice exam answers persist when revisiting questions
description: Verifies selected answers remain selected when navigating away and returning to previously answered questions during an exam.

steps.description: Click the navigation to open the practice exams list
Choose an available practice exam from the list
Select an answer option for the current question
Navigate back to the previous question
Verify the previously selected answer is still selected on the question

title: Send a message in an existing conversation
description: Verifies a user can open a conversation and send a message that appears in the chat history.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open chat
Open the first conversation in the conversation list
Fill "Message TC011" into the message input field
Verify the new message appears in the conversation history

title: Remove a friend from the friends list
description: Verifies a user can remove an existing friend and the friend no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open friends management
Remove the first friend in the friends list
Verify the removed friend no longer appears in the friends list

title: Validate required fields when saving profile
description: Verifies the profile form prevents saving when required fields are cleared and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify profile changes are not saved

title: Open a user profile from a post
description: Verifies a user can navigate from a post author to that user's public profile view.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the social feed
Open the author profile from the first post in the feed
Verify a user profile page is displayed

title: Update email from profile settings
description: Verifies a user can submit an email update from profile settings and sees a confirmation state in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Fill test+updated@example.com into the email field
Verify an email update confirmation is visible

title: View conversation history grouped by date
description: Verifies the conversation history displays date group separators while scrolling through messages.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open chat
Open the first conversation in the conversation list
Scroll up within the message history to load earlier messages
Verify messages are grouped by date in the history

title: Cancel editing does not change profile information
description: Verifies leaving the profile edit state without saving does not change the displayed profile information.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Record the currently displayed name value
Fill Temp Name Not Saved into the name field
Navigate to the dashboard using the app navigation
Click the navigation item to open the user profile settings
Verify the displayed name value is unchanged from the previously recorded value

title: Open a friend profile from the friends list
description: Verifies a user can open a friend's profile page from the friends list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open friends management
Open the profile for the first friend in the list
Verify a friend profile page is displayed

title: Prevent publishing an empty post
description: Verifies the user cannot publish a post without content and receives a validation indication.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the social feed
Publish the post without adding content
Verify a validation error is visible and the post is not published

title: Prevent sending an empty chat message
description: Verifies the user cannot send a blank message and receives a validation indication.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open chat
Open the first conversation in the conversation list
Send the message without entering text
Verify a validation error is visible and no message is added to the history

title: Invalid login shows error feedback
description: Verifies a user entering invalid credentials sees an invalid-credentials error and is not logged in.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill WrongPassword123! into the password field
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible

title: View social feed when there are no posts
description: Verifies the social feed shows a clear empty state when there are no posts to display.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the social feed
Verify an empty state message is visible for the feed

title: Empty chat state when there are no conversations
description: Verifies the chat page shows an empty state when the user has no conversations.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open chat
Verify an empty state message is visible for conversations

title: Search with no matches shows empty state
description: Verifies searching for a non-existent user shows a clear no-results state.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open friends management
Fill "user-does-not-exist-xyz" into the user search field
Verify a no-results empty state is visible for the search
